HGSS.137.0000:
Young Pokéathlete!
Hello!\f
...\f
Running out of energy?
Hello, again!\f
Good!
My name is Maximo!\f
I am the Pokéathlon MC!
Nice to meet you!\f
I’ll be there for you when you
need to know anything about\r
the Pokéathlon.\f
HGSS.137.0001:
Maximo: Hello!\f
I’ll be there for you when you
need to know anything about\r
the Pokéathlon.\f
HGSS.137.0003:
Which course do you want to
know about? [0200,0000]
HGSS.137.0004:
Which event do you want to
know about? [0200,0000]
HGSS.137.0005:
Let me explain the Pokéathlon!\f
It’s the connection between Pokémon
and Pokéathletes.\f
It is friendship itself!
...What?\f
You don’t get it?
OK. I won’t be as brief this time.\f
You are to form a team of three
Pokémon to compete in ten\r
different events!\f
The friendship between Pokémon and
Pokéathletes is tested!\f
That is what we call friendship!
Do you understand what I mean?\f
HGSS.137.0006:
I’ll explain “Hurdle Dash” for you.
It is an event to test your speed.\f
Your Pokémon needs to jump
when the Hurdle comes near.\f
If it jumps at the right time,
it will go over the Hurdle!\f
The total time of the three Pokémon
gives you the event score.\f
This is an event for speedy Pokémon
that move quickly like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0007:
I’ll explain “Pennant Capture”
for you.\f
Your Pokémon grab Pennants on
the beach.\f
Grabbing Pennants doesn’t add to
your score.\f
You have to come back with
the Pennants.\f
This is an event for speedy and skillful
Pokémon that move like I do!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0008:
I’ll explain “Circle Push” for you.
Your Pokémon push others to try\r
and stay in a Circle.\f
You will get points as long as your
Pokémon stay in a Circle.\f
The total time of the three Pokémon
gives your score.\f
This is an event for powerful Pokémon
with stamina that are strong like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0009:
I’ll explain “Block Smash” for you.
You smash Blocks as the name suggests.\f
The number of Blocks you smash
will be the score you’ll get.\f
It’s so simple, isn’t it?\f
This is an event for powerful Pokémon
that are strong like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0010:
I’ll explain “Disc Catch” for you.
Your Pokémon jump and catch\r
Discs that come flying toward them.\f
The longer you wait before they catch
the Discs, the more points you get.\r
The total points will decide the score.\f
This is an event for powerful and jumpy
Pokémon that move like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?
OK, do you have any other questions?\f
HGSS.137.0011:
I’ll explain “Lamp Jump” for you.
Your Pokémon bounce to jump high\r
and touch as many Lamps as they can.\f
The more Lamps they touch, the more
points you get.\f
The total points will decide the score.\f
This is an event for jumpy Pokémon
that are jumpy like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0012:
I’ll explain “Relay Run” for you.
Your Pokémon run in turns as far as\r
they can in 90 seconds.\f
The distance of the Relay will decide
the score.\f
This is an event for speedy Pokémon
with stamina... Ones just like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0013:
I’ll explain “Ring Drop” for you.
Your Pokémon try to knock other\r
Pokémon out of the Ring.\f
A tackle gives you one point.
A stomp on another Pokémon\r
gives you two points.\f
If your Pokémon knock another Pokémon
off the Ring, making them drop, you get\r
ten points.\f
This is an event for Pokémon with
stamina just like I have!\f
Do you understand what I mean?
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0014:
I’ll explain “Snow Throw” for you.
Snow Throw may not ring a bell but...\r
how about a Snowball fight?\f
The more your Pokémon hit other
Pokémon with Snow, the higher the\r
score will be.\f
This is an event for powerful and
skillful Pokémon... Ones just like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0015:
I’ll explain “Goal Roll” for you.
Your Pokémon try to roll the ball into\r
the Goals of the other Pokémon teams.\f
Most balls will give you one point.\f
Gold-colored balls will give you
two points.\f
The number of points will decide
your rank, and that decides the score.\f
This is an event for powerful and
skillful Pokémon... Ones just like me!\f
Do you understand what I mean?\f
OK, do you have any more questions?\f
HGSS.137.0016:
Young Pokéathlete!\f
Don’t forget to do your Pokéathlon
stretches before exercise!
HGSS.137.0017:
Me? Are you interested in me?
Hahaha!\r
Oh, don’t be shy.\f
Some people call me the “big brother”!\f
But really, the big brother is...
...\r
...\r
my twin brother!\f
The “big brother,” as they say, is
really the younger brother.\f
So this “big brother” has a
bigger brother...\f
Do you get what I mean?\f
HGSS.137.0024:
The Pokéathlon is all about scores.\f
No one knows who’s going to win
until the last moment!
HGSS.137.0025:
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000] is
always splendid!\f
I can’t take my eyes off
that Pokéathlete!\f
...
Wait... Wow! Is that really you?
HGSS.137.0026:
Aprijuice for victory!\f
Your Pokémon can show their
true Performance potential!
HGSS.137.0027:
Aprijuice for victory!\f
What drink do you use,
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I’ll buy what you buy!\r
I’m a big fan!
HGSS.137.0028:
Er... I...I will try to win at every
course with MAGIKARP!
HGSS.137.0029:
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Er... How...how can I win at every
course with MAGIKARP?
HGSS.137.0030:
I will break my personal record
at Hurdle Dash!\f
OK, which Pokémon should
I choose...?
HGSS.137.0031:
Y-y-you’re Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I have no clue how I could possibly
reach where you are!\r
You are the Pokéathlon itself!
HGSS.137.0032:
Wow!
That guy over there is Magnus,\r
the Pokéathlon owner!\f
I heard he once beat a MACHAMP at
arm wrestling. Could it be true?
HGSS.137.0033:
Yikes!
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I am a huge fan of yours!
Oh my...what should I do?\r
Can you give me an autograph?
HGSS.137.0035:
Arrgh!
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!\f
You make me feel young again!\r
I’ll root for you!
HGSS.137.0037:
Oh my!
It’s Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!\f
You look just like my son.\r
I’m rooting for you.
HGSS.137.0038:
Oh my!
It’s Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!\f
You look just like my daughter.\r
I’m rooting for you.
HGSS.137.0039:
My boyfriend’s a Pokéathlete.\f
But he’s so shy about it that I root
for him behind a column so he won’t\r
spot me!
HGSS.137.0040:
Don’t you think he’s so cool dripping
sweat just like his Pokémon?\f
Not that he even compares to the great
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000], though.
HGSS.137.0041:
Participate in the Pokéathlon to
reduce stress.\r
That’s the way to go!
HGSS.137.0042:
Don’t you dare underestimate your mom.
The look on her face when she was\r
selling things at a bargain...\f
It still gives me shivers!\f
HGSS.137.0043:
Every father longs to be a hero to
their son.\f
The Pokéathlon...
Do I want to take it up?\f
Just you wait and see, Son!
HGSS.137.0044:
Ahh... My son!
I’m so sad to hear that.\f
Let me hear you say you want to be
like your dad...\f
HGSS.137.0045:
My mom will finally participate.\f
I was starting to worry because she
never exercises.\f
HGSS.137.0046:
I’ll grow up to be a great
Pokéathlete like you, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.137.0048:
Are you Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]?\f
For real?
I can’t believe it!
HGSS.137.0050:
Are you Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Tap... Tap... Tap...\f
I can’t believe it! I touched my hero!
HGSS.137.0051:
I didn’t expect so many rather old
ladies like me participating.\r
Maybe I can join them.\f
It may be a chance to get close to
my hero--Pokéathlete Jet!\r
Hahaha!
HGSS.137.0052:
Yeek!!\f
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000]!
Every time you are in the game,\r
my daughters’ eyes stay wide open!\f
Could I ask for an autograph?\r
...No no!\f
Not for me. It’s for my daughters.
Ha ha!
